title: Project: Explosive
description: Adds realistic explosions while keeping Minecraft’s vanilla style.
body:
![Project Explosive](https://cdn.corenexis.com/files/c/5254232720.png) # Project : Explosive **Adding realistic explosions while maintaining the vanilla style.** [![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/YouTube-Subscribe-red?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&logoColor=white)](https://www.youtube.com/@explosive_miner) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-Support%20me-FF5E5B?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/moaierdev)
--- ### Development Status > **Notice**: A major update is currently in development and will be released soon. > This project is in its early alpha stage (Creative mode only). You may encounter bugs or performance issues as we continue to optimize. --- ### Features The mod currently introduces four types of explosives with custom physics: * **Small Bomb** * **Big Bomb** * **Nuclear Bomb** * **Flame Bomb**
| Small | Big | Nuclear | | :---: | :---: | :---: | | ![Small](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3rXU9gz8/images/cfb487b3a4b2898062bb3f9d4fc2323ad764192a_350.webp) | ![Big](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3rXU9gz8/images/c27eeff0a4df36e49b9332151416982dff03ac97_350.webp) | ![Nuclear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3rXU9gz8/images/4d6d7b62524f213597c70c11764ce2a76b9a60d0_350.webp) |
--- ### Media & Showcases #### Latest Version: 0.5 — Fire Physics & Nuclear Rework
View older updates
**0.4 — Nuke Rework** **0.2 Rework**
--- ### Community & Feedback I personally read all feedback to help improve the mod. If you encounter a bug or have a suggestion for a future update, please feel free to share it in the comments of my YouTube videos. Thank you for your support.
